title: Operate a cane harvester
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate a cane harvester demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare cane harvesting equipment for use

pcs.text: Confirm work activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks implementing safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm work activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks implementing safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm work activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks implementing safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Source and interpret relevant cane harvester operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and interpret relevant cane harvester operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and interpret relevant cane harvester operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements and applicable to task to be undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements and applicable to task to be undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements and applicable to task to be undertaken.

pcs.text: Conduct cane harvester routine pre-operational checks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct cane harvester routine pre-operational checks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct cane harvester routine pre-operational checks.

pcs.text: Document damaged or worn components and organise for replacement according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document damaged or worn components and organise for replacement according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document damaged or worn components and organise for replacement according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Conduct cabin drill according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct cabin drill according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct cabin drill according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Locate and select crop class, variety and field for harvest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and select crop class, variety and field for harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and select crop class, variety and field for harvest.

elements.title: Carry out cane harvesting

pcs.text: Carry out pre-start, and start up procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-start, and start up procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-start, and start up procedures.

pcs.text: Set and operate cane harvester in a safe, controlled and correct manner and monitor for performance and efficiency
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set and operate cane harvester in a safe, controlled and correct manner and monitor for performance and efficiency?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set and operate cane harvester in a safe, controlled and correct manner and monitor for performance and efficiency.

pcs.text: Operate cane harvester in co-ordination with cane haulage vehicles and other associated harvesting equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate cane harvester in co-ordination with cane haulage vehicles and other associated harvesting equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate cane harvester in co-ordination with cane haulage vehicles and other associated harvesting equipment.

pcs.text: Harvest cane in a productive, safe and controlled manner and consign according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Harvest cane in a productive, safe and controlled manner and consign according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Harvest cane in a productive, safe and controlled manner and consign according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with cane harvesting and undertake activities to minimise impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with cane harvesting and undertake activities to minimise impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with cane harvesting and undertake activities to minimise impact.

pcs.text: Continually monitor hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel, plant and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Continually monitor hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel, plant and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Continually monitor hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel, plant and equipment.

elements.title: Complete cane harvesting operations

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Park cane harvester and conduct shut down procedures according to workplace practices.

pcs.text: Perform routine operational servicing and minor maintenance

pcs.text: Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and sterilise cane harvester to prevent cross-site contamination.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store and secure cane harvester.

pcs.text: Remove and store keys in the required location

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and store keys in the required location.

pcs.text: Maintain cane harvester use records in required format
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain cane harvester use records in required format?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain cane harvester use records in required format.
